release_blockers: 12 schema terms are missing rdfs:label annotations.
33 schema terms are missing skos:definition annotations.
The ontology contains many QUDT quantity-value nodes that should remain in an example or data module.
fair_blockers: Version IRI and preferred namespace metadata are not consistently declared in the source ontology header.
Schema annotation coverage is incomplete for labels, comments, and definitions.
The source graph mixes schema and data-like resources, which reduces release clarity.

sample_schema_terms.label: hasParameter
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a process or measurement to a parameter that specifies one of its inputs, settings, or operating conditions.

sample_schema_terms.label: hasProperty
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a measurement to a property that is determined, reported, or otherwise associated with that measurement.

sample_schema_terms.label: usesInstrument
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a process or measurement to an instrument used to carry it out or support it.

sample_schema_terms.label: hasInputMaterial
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a process or measurement to a material entity that serves as an input.

sample_schema_terms.label: hasOutputMaterial
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a process to a material entity produced as an output.

sample_schema_terms.label: hasOutputData
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a measurement or process to data generated as an output.

sample_schema_terms.label: hasInputData
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a process or measurement to data used as an input.

sample_schema_terms.label: measures
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a measurement to a property that it determines.

sample_schema_terms.label: ofProperty
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a data point to the property represented by that data point.

sample_schema_terms.label: fromMeasurement
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a data point to the measurement from which it was generated.

sample_schema_terms.label: isPartOf
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating an entity or process to a larger entity or process of which it forms a part.

sample_schema_terms.label: hasIdentifier
sample_schema_terms.description: A datatype property relating a resource to a literal identifier used to distinguish or reference it.

sample_schema_terms.label: Agent
sample_schema_terms.description: A class representing an agent that is responsible for carrying out a process, producing data, or contributing to the provenance of a resource in H2KG.

sample_schema_terms.label: Instrument
sample_schema_terms.description: A class representing an instrument used to perform, support, or control a measurement or manufacturing process in H2KG.

sample_schema_terms.label: hasSubProcess
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a process to a subprocess that forms part of its overall execution.

sample_schema_terms.label: atCurrentDensity
sample_schema_terms.description: An object property relating a data point to the current-density value at which it is reported.

sample_schema_terms.label: Parameter
sample_schema_terms.description: A class representing a parameter specified as an input, setting, or condition for a process or measurement in H2KG.

sample_schema_terms.label: Unit
sample_schema_terms.description: A class representing a unit used to express the value of a quantity in H2KG.

sample_schema_terms.label: Process
sample_schema_terms.description: A class representing a process that transforms material, produces data, or changes the state of a system in H2KG.
